name: business-analyst
description: Master modern business analysis with AI-powered analytics,
capabilities: Design comprehensive KPI frameworks with North Star metrics and OKR alignment
Build predictive models for customer churn, revenue forecasting, and market trends
Create executive dashboards with Tableau, Power BI, Looker, and Qlik Sense
Perform statistical analysis including A/B testing, hypothesis testing, and cohort analysis
Develop customer segmentation, persona models, and journey mapping
Generate financial models for unit economics, LTV/CAC optimization, and scenario planning
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files and detected 0 security issues. The skill provides business analysis guidance, KPI frameworks, and analytics best practices through instructional prompts only. No network access, file system operations, external commands, or environment variable access detected.
valueStatement: Businesses struggle to extract actionable insights from complex data. This skill delivers expert-level analysis, predictive modeling, and executive-ready dashboards that drive confident decision-making.
userTitle: Transform data into strategic business decisions
limitations: Cannot directly connect to live data sources or databases
Requires user to provide raw data or export files for analysis
Cannot execute SQL queries or run analytics code directly
Dashboard designs must be manually implemented in BI tools by the user

useCases.title: Executive Dashboard Design
useCases.description: Create comprehensive executive dashboards that consolidate key business metrics with trend analysis, automated alerts, and drill-down capabilities for leadership decision-making.

useCases.targetUser: Marketing analysts and customer success teams
useCases.title: Customer Analytics Program
useCases.description: Build predictive churn models, customer lifetime value frameworks, and segmentation analysis to optimize acquisition strategies and retention initiatives.

useCases.title: Financial Planning Automation
useCases.description: Develop revenue forecasting models, scenario planning frameworks, and unit economics analysis to support strategic planning and investor reporting.

promptTemplates.title: KPI Framework Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: Define North Star metrics and supporting KPIs for our [business type]. Include metric definitions, data sources, calculation formulas, and target benchmarks aligned with our strategic objectives.

promptTemplates.title: Churn Analysis Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze our customer churn data from [time period]. Identify patterns in churned customers, build a risk scoring model, and recommend prevention strategies with expected impact on retention rates.

promptTemplates.title: Dashboard Specification
promptTemplates.prompt: Design an executive dashboard for [department/function]. Specify chart types, metrics, filters, and layout. Include data refresh requirements, alert thresholds, and mobile responsiveness considerations.

promptTemplates.title: Market Sizing Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Conduct TAM/SAM/SOM analysis for [product/service] in [market/region]. Include methodology, data sources, segmentation criteria, growth rate assumptions, and competitive landscape assessment.

bestPractices: Always validate data quality and methodology before drawing conclusions from any analysis
Design dashboards for specific audience needs with progressive disclosure from executive summary to detailed views
Establish clear metric definitions and calculation standards to ensure organizational alignment
antiPatterns: Avoid vanity metrics that look impressive but do not drive actionable business decisions
Do not present raw data without context, benchmarks, or interpretation of business implications
Never recommend actions based on correlation without investigating causation and confounding factors

faq.question: What data formats does this skill support for analysis?
faq.answer: This skill works with any data you can provide in text format including CSV exports, JSON data, SQL query results, or structured summaries. For large datasets, provide aggregated views or sample subsets with clear context about the full data scope.

faq.question: Can this skill create actual dashboards in Tableau or Power BI?
faq.answer: This skill provides detailed dashboard specifications including chart types, metric definitions, layout recommendations, and implementation guidance. You will need to build the actual dashboards in your BI tool using these specifications.

faq.question: How accurate are the predictive models generated?
faq.answer: Model accuracy depends entirely on your data quality, sample size, and feature selection. This skill provides statistically sound methodologies and helps you interpret results correctly. Always validate models against holdout data before operational use.

faq.question: Can this skill help with SQL query writing for data extraction?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill can write SQL queries, explain query optimization, and help design data extraction logic. However, queries must be executed by you in your database environment.

faq.question: What statistical methods are available for A/B testing analysis?
faq.answer: This skill supports t-tests, chi-square tests, Bayesian analysis, sequential testing, power analysis, and multi-armed bandit approaches. It also helps design experiments with proper sample sizes and significance thresholds.

faq.question: Does this skill provide industry-specific analytics guidance?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill covers analytics for e-commerce, SaaS, healthcare, financial services, manufacturing, and marketing. Specify your industry context to receive relevant frameworks, benchmarks, and best practices.
